JIANGXIAOMOD-RUINANCE_POWER.title: Ruinance
JIANGXIAOMOD-BEAT_BACK_POWER.title: Beat Back
JIANGXIAOMOD-BEAT_BACK_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, gain X lost [gold]Strength[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-BEAT_BACK_POWER.smartDescri: At the end of your turn, gain {Amount} lost [gold]Strength[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-CHENG_YIN_POWER.title: Cheng Yin
JIANGXIAOMOD-CHENG_YIN_POWER.description:
Guiding the medical light of the bell.
 Upon taking damage, gain [gold]X[/gold] Regen.
JIANGXIAOMOD-CHENG_YIN_POWER.smartDescri:
Guiding the medical light of the bell.
 Upon taking damage, gain [gold]{RegenAmt:diff()}[/gold] Regen.
JIANGXIAOMOD-DAWN_POWER.title: Dawn
JIANGXIAOMOD-DAWN_POWER.description: Draw [gold]X[/gold] additional cards each turn. Yearning always chases a sliver of dawn.
JIANGXIAOMOD-DAWN_POWER.smartDescription: Draw [gold]{Amount}[/gold] additional cards each turn. Yearning always chases a sliver of dawn.
JIANGXIAOMOD-YEARNING_HALO_POWER.title: Yearning Halo
JIANGXIAOMOD-RESENTMENT_POWER.title: Resentment
JIANGXIAOMOD-RESENTMENT_POWER.descriptio: Upon being attacked, has a [gold]X%[/gold] chance to inflict a random debuff on the attacker.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RESENTMENT_POWER.smartDescr: Upon being attacked, has a [gold]{M:diff()}%[/gold] chance to inflict a random debuff on the attacker.
JIANGXIAOMOD-TEAR_OF_SORROW_POWER.title: Tear of Sorrow
JIANGXIAOMOD-TEAR_OF_SORROW_POWER.descri: At the start of this unit's turn, loses [gold]1%[/gold] of its Max HP per stack.
JIANGXIAOMOD-TEAR_OF_SORROW_POWER.smartD: At the start of this unit's turn, loses [gold]{Amount}%[/gold] of its Max HP.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BEI_DOU_NINE_STARS_POWER.ti: Star Map: Big Dipper Nine Stars
JIANGXIAOMOD-BEI_DOU_NINE_STARS_POWER.de:
Gain 1 stack whenever a card is played. Upon reaching [red]9 Stacks[/red]:
Gain [gold]X[/gold] Energy and draw [gold]X[/gold] cards.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BEI_DOU_NINE_STARS_POWER.sm:
Gain 1 stack whenever a card is played. Upon reaching [red]9 Stacks[/red]:
Gain [gold]{M}[/gold] Energy and draw [gold]{N}[/gold] cards.
JIANGXIAOMOD-FLOWER_BLADE_POWER.title: Star Map: Flower Blade
JIANGXIAOMOD-FLOWER_BLADE_POWER.descript:
Increase damage of [gold]Xia Style[/gold], [gold]Green Glow[/gold], and [gold]Strike[/gold] cards by X.
After playing X of the above cards, randomly gain [gold]I[/gold], [gold]II[/gold], or [gold]III[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-FLOWER_BLADE_POWER.smartDes:
Increase damage of [gold]Xia Style[/gold], [gold]Green Glow[/gold], and [gold]Strike[/gold] cards by {M}.
After playing {Y} of the above cards, randomly gain [gold]I[/gold], [gold]II[/gold], or [gold]III[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-WITHER_BOW_POWER.title: Star Map: Wither Bow
JIANGXIAOMOD-WITHER_BOW_POWER.descriptio: [gold]Bow Mastery[/gold] cards deal X% more damage and apply X Poison and X Calamity.
JIANGXIAOMOD-WITHER_BOW_POWER.smartDescr: [gold]Bow Mastery[/gold] cards deal {X}% more damage and apply {M} Poison and {Y} Calamity.
JIANGXIAOMOD-SOUL_OF_DEVOURING_SEA_POWER: Star Map: Soul of Devouring Sea
When attacking, Fatally Execute enemies whose HP is below X%.
When attacking, Fatally Execute enemies whose HP is below {M}%.
JIANGXIAOMOD-INK_FLOWER_POWER.title: Star Map: Ink Flower
JIANGXIAOMOD-INK_FLOWER_POWER.descriptio:
Gain X stacks of [gold]Slippery[/gold], resets each turn.
Stuns the attacker.
JIANGXIAOMOD-INK_FLOWER_POWER.smartDescr:
Gain {M} stacks of [gold]Slippery[/gold], resets each turn.
Stuns the attacker.
JIANGXIAOMOD-HOLY_CROSS_POWER.title: Star Map: Holy Cross
JIANGXIAOMOD-PEAK_OF_LIFE_POWER.title: Star Map: Peak of Life
JIANGXIAOMOD-PEAK_OF_LIFE_POWER.descript: Gain X temporary Max HP for this combat, and gain X Regen, X Strength, and X Dexterity.
JIANGXIAOMOD-PEAK_OF_LIFE_POWER.smartDes: Gain {X} temporary Max HP for this combat, and gain {X} Regen, {M} Strength, and {M} Dexterity.
JIANGXIAOMOD-EARTH_STAR_MAP_POWER.title: Star Map: Earth
JIANGXIAOMOD-EARTH_STAR_MAP_POWER.descri: Remove Max HP limit for this combat. Heal to full HP at the start of each turn.
JIANGXIAOMOD-EARTH_STAR_MAP_POWER.smartD:
Remove Max HP limit for this combat. Heal to full HP at the start of each turn.
Absorb 50% of damage taken by allies.
JIANGXIAOMOD-COMBAT_KNIFE_ADVANCED_POWER: Whenever a [gold]Combat Knife Mastery[/gold] or [gold]Unarmed Combat[/gold] card is played, gain 6 Block.
Whenever a [gold]Combat Knife Mastery[/gold] or [gold]Unarmed Combat[/gold] card is played, gain {Amount} Block.
JIANGXIAOMOD-SILENCE_POWER.title: Voice of Silence
JIANGXIAOMOD-SILENCE_POWER.description:
This unit's positive abilities have been sealed. Loses 1 stack each turn.
When stacks reach 0, returns all sealed abilities and removes [gold]Voice of Silence: Astral Chaos[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-SILENCE_POWER.smartDescript:
This unit's positive abilities have been sealed. Loses 1 stack each turn.
When stacks reach 0, returns all sealed abilities and removes [gold]Voice of Silence: Astral Chaos[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-SILENCE_DAMAGE_POWER.title: Voice of Silence: Astral Chaos
JIANGXIAOMOD-SILENCE_DAMAGE_POWER.descri: At the start of its turn, loses [red]X[/red] HP.
JIANGXIAOMOD-SILENCE_DAMAGE_POWER.smartD: At the start of its turn, loses [red]{Amount}[/red] HP.
JIANGXIAOMOD-DOMAIN_OF_TEARS_POWER.title: Domain of Tears
JIANGXIAOMOD-DOMAIN_OF_TEARS_POWER.descr:
At the start of your turn, automatically play corresponding cards, prioritizing from [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] (then Exhaust, Hand):
[red]Enemy Attacking[/red]: Protection / Space Rift
[blue]Enemy Defending[/blue]: Strike / Green Glow
[green]Enemy Buffing/Debuffing[/green]: Heal / Abundant Star Power
(Plays 1 card at Lv.1-3, 2 cards at Lv.4-5, 3 cards at Lv.6 or higher).
JIANGXIAOMOD-DOMAIN_OF_TEARS_POWER.smart:
At the start of your turn, automatically play corresponding cards, prioritizing from [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] (then Exhaust, Hand):
[red]Enemy Attacking[/red]: Protection / Space Rift
[blue]Enemy Defending[/blue]: Strike / Green Glow
[green]Enemy Buffing/Debuffing[/green]: Heal / Abundant Star Power
(Currently playing {Amount} cards).
